variables.notes: Selected COGS bucket is only 'Raw materials and consumables used'. The separate 'Depreciation and amortisation' line is above EBIT but functionally unallocated, so it should not be assigned to COGS separately.

variables.notes: The selected XSGA bucket consists of 'Personnel expenses', 'Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses', and 'Other operating expenses', and prior mapping notes explicitly excluded depreciation/amortisation. Because 'Depreciation and amortisation' is a separate same-level operating line above EBIT, it appears outside those selected rows and should be added separately. Manual review is flagged because the statement does not split this D&A between production/COGS and SG&A, so full assignment to XSGA may overstate SG&A-related D&A.
